volumes.title: Volume I — The Foundations of Spark
volumes.subtitle: Architecture, DAG, Partitions, Shuffle

chapters.title: The Spark Architecture
chapters.description: Driver, Executors, DAG Scheduler, Task Scheduler, Cluster Manager — the full mental model.

chapters.title: RDDs, DataFrames, and the Dataset API
chapters.description: Why RDDs gave way to DataFrames, Catalyst vs Tungsten, and when to drop back to RDDs.

chapters.title: Lazy Evaluation & the DAG
chapters.description: Transformations vs actions, lineage graphs, stage boundaries, and the execution model.

chapters.title: Partitions & Parallelism
chapters.description: How data is split, default parallelism, repartition vs coalesce, and partition sizing.

chapters.title: The Shuffle — The Great Enemy
chapters.description: Sort-merge join mechanics, shuffle read/write metrics, skew, and how to minimize shuffle.

chapters.title: Catalyst Optimizer Deep Dive
chapters.description: The 4 phases: analysis, logical optimization, physical planning, and code generation.

chapters.title: Reading Query Plans
chapters.description: How to read explain() output, identify bottlenecks, and spot predicate pushdown in action.

chapters.title: Join Strategies & Optimization
chapters.description: Broadcast, Sort-Merge, Shuffle Hash — when Spark picks each, and how to force your choice.

chapters.title: Aggregations at Scale
chapters.description: Two-phase HashAggregate, partial aggregate, countDistinct vs approx_count_distinct, CUBE and ROLLUP.

chapters.title: Window Functions Mastery
chapters.description: WindowSpec, frame types, ranking functions, running totals, sessionization.

chapters.title: Parquet Deep Dive
chapters.description: Row groups, column chunks, min/max statistics, dictionary encoding, and predicate pushdown.

chapters.title: Delta Lake & ACID on Spark
chapters.description: Transaction log, snapshot isolation, time travel, schema evolution, and MERGE INTO.

chapters.title: Z-Ordering & Data Skipping
chapters.description: What Z-ordering does to file layout, when it helps, and when it doesn't.

chapters.title: Small File Problem & Compaction
chapters.description: Why streaming writes create small files, OPTIMIZE, auto-compaction, and bin-packing.

chapters.title: Structured Streaming Model
chapters.description: Micro-batch vs continuous, trigger types, checkpointing, exactly-once semantics.

chapters.title: Kafka + Spark Integration
chapters.description: Reading and writing Kafka topics, offset management, consumer groups, schema registry.

chapters.title: Stateful Streaming & Watermarks
chapters.description: Aggregations over time, event time vs processing time, late data handling, watermarks.

volumes.title: Volume V — Performance Engineering
volumes.subtitle: AQE, Skew Handling, Caching Strategy, Tuning

chapters.title: Adaptive Query Execution (AQE)
chapters.description: How AQE re-optimizes at runtime: skew join splits, dynamic coalescing, switch join strategies.

chapters.title: Handling Data Skew
chapters.description: Salting, key isolation, broadcast small skewed tables, and AQE skew join detection.

chapters.title: Memory Tuning & Spill Prevention
chapters.description: Executor memory regions, spark.memory.fraction, storage vs execution, OOM diagnosis.

chapters.title: Spark Configuration Cheatsheet
chapters.description: The 20 configs that matter most at MAANG scale — with recommended values and reasoning.
